questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 下列哪一个 AWS 服务是无服务器的？ （选两个。）
question_text.en: Which of the following AWS services are serverless? (Choose two.)

A.zh: AWS Outposts
A.en: AWS Outposts

B.zh: Amazon EC2
B.en: Amazon EC2

C.zh: Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS)
C.en: Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS)

D.zh: AWS Fargate
D.en: AWS Fargate

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该服务是一种混合云解决方案，允许用户在本地运行 AWS 服务，但它需要用户管理硬件，因此不是无服务器服务。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a hybrid cloud solution that allows users to run AWS services locally, but it requires users to manage hardware and is therefore not a Serverless service.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon EC2 是虚拟服务器服务。用户需要管理实例的启动、停止、设置等操作，因此不是Serverless服务。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a virtual server service. Users need to manage the startup, stop, configuration and other operations of the instance, so it is not a Serverless service.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon EKS 是一项托管 Kubernetes 服务。虽然简化了容器管理，但用户仍然需要管理底层节点，所以并不是完全Serverless。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon EKS is a managed Kubernetes service. Although container management is simplified, users still need to manage the underlying nodes, so it is not completely Serverless.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Fargate 是无服务器容器服务。用户无需管理底层服务器或集群，专注于运行容器。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: This service is a Serverless container service. Users do not need to manage underlying servers or clusters and focus on running containers.

E.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Lambda 是无服务器计算服务。用户只需上传代码，AWS自动管理底层资源。
E.en: Correct. Technical reason: This service is a Serverless computing service. Users only need to upload code, and AWS automatically manages the underlying resources.

answer_text.en: D. AWS Fargate; E. AWS Lambda

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：DE (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Fargate 是无服务器容器服务。用户无需管理底层服务器或集群，专注于运行容器。；AWS Lambda 是无服务器计算服务。用户只需上传代码，AWS自动管理底层资源。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: DE (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This service is a Serverless container service. Users do not need to manage underlying servers or clusters and focus on running containers.; This service is a Serverless computing service. Users only need to upload code, and AWS automatically manages the underlying resources.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 当用户想要将其现有的每插槽、每内核或每虚拟机软件授权用于在 AWS 上运行的 Microsoft Windows 服务器时，需要哪种 Amazon EC2 实例类型？
question_text.en: When a user wants to utilize their existing per-socket, per-core, or per-virtual machine software licenses for a Microsoft Windows server running on AWS, which Amazon EC2 instance type is required?

A.zh: 竞价型实例
A.en: Spot Instances

B.zh: Dedicated Instances
B.en: Dedicated Instances

C.zh: Dedicated Hosts
C.en: Dedicated Hosts

D.zh: 预留实例
D.en: Reserved Instances

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该选项是按需竞价实例类型，主要用于短期计算任务，无法保证长期资源分配。它不支持自带授权 (BYOL) 功能。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: These choices are on-demand bidding instance types that are mainly used for short-term computing tasks and cannot guarantee long-term resource allocation. It does not support the bring-your-own-license (BYOL) feature.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：在单一租户硬件上运行，但它不提供对底层硬件的完全控制。虽然专用主机可以满足某些合规性要求，但自带授权 (BYOL) 功能通常需要专用主机。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: run on single-tenant hardware, but it does not provide full control of the underlying hardware. While it can meet certain compliance requirements, Dedicated Hosts are typically required for bring-your-own-license (BYOL) functionality.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：此选项提供对底层物理服务器的完全控制，允许用户使用自己的软件授权 (BYOL)。这是 AWS 推荐的选项，特别是对于 Microsoft Windows Server 等需要绑定到特定硬件的授权。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option provide complete control over the underlying physical server, allowing users to use their own software license (BYOL). It is the recommended option by AWS, especially for licenses like Microsoft Windows Server that require binding to specific hardware.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该服务是一种计费选项，提供长期成本优化，但不涉及底层硬件的控制。它不支持自带授权 (BYOL) 功能。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a billing option that provides long-term cost optimization, but it does not involve control of the underlying hardware. It does not support the bring-your-own-license (BYOL) feature.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：此选项提供对底层物理服务器的完全控制，允许用户使用自己的软件授权 (BYOL)。这是 AWS 推荐的选项，特别是对于 Microsoft Windows Server 等需要绑定到特定硬件的授权。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option provide complete control over the underlying physical server, allowing users to use their own software license (BYOL). It is the recommended option by AWS, especially for licenses like Microsoft Windows Server that require binding to specific hardware.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 解决方案架构师需要维护一组 Amazon EC2 实例，以便将任何受损的实例替换为新实例。解决方案架构师应该使用哪种 AWS 服务？
question_text.en: A solutions architect needs to maintain a fleet of Amazon EC2 instances so that any impaired instances are replaced with new ones. Which AWS service should the solutions architect use?

A.zh: Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS)
A.en: Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS)

B.zh: Amazon GuardDuty
B.en: Amazon GuardDuty

C.zh: AWS Shield
C.en: AWS Shield

D.zh: AWS Auto Scaling
D.en: AWS Auto Scaling

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon ECS 是一种容器编排服务，用于运行和管理容器化应用程序。它不负责直接管理EC2实例的健康状态或更换损坏的实例。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon ECS is a container orchestration service for running and managing containerized applications. It is not responsible for directly managing the health status of EC2 instances or replacing damaged instances.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon GuardDuty 是一项威胁检测服务，可识别现有的安全性问题和异常活动。它不会影响 EC2 实例的健康检查或替换功能。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a threat detection service that identifies existing security issues and abnormal activity. It does not affect the health check or replacement functionality of EC2 instances.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Shield 是分布式拒绝服务 (DDoS) 保护服务，旨在保护应用程序免受攻击。与EC2实例的健康状态管理无关。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a distributed denial-of-service (DDoS) protection service designed to protect applications from attacks. It has nothing to do with health status management of EC2 instances.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Auto Scaling 是根据需求自动扩展 EC2 实例数量并取代损坏实例的服务，以确保您的应用程序的高可用性。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: This service is a service that automatically scales the number of EC2 instances based on demand and replaces damaged instances to ensure high availability of your application.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：D (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Auto Scaling 是根据需求自动扩展 EC2 实例数量并取代损坏实例的服务，以确保您的应用程序的高可用性。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This service is a service that automatically scales the number of EC2 instances based on demand and replaces damaged instances to ensure high availability of your application.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪种 AWS 服务为本地应用程序提供对 AWS 云中存储的数据的低延迟访问？
question_text.en: Which AWS service provides on-premises applications with low-latency access to data that is stored in the AWS Cloud?

A.zh: Amazon CloudFront
A.en: Amazon CloudFront

B.zh: AWS Storage Gateway
B.en: AWS Storage Gateway

C.zh: AWS Backup
C.en: AWS Backup

D.zh: AWS DataSync
D.en: AWS DataSync

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon CloudFront 是一项内容交付网络 (CDN) 服务，可加速动态和动态内容的交付。它主要用于优化内容交付，而不是为本地应用程序提供对云存储数据的低延迟访问。所以。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a content delivery network (CDN) service that accelerates the delivery of dynamic and dynamic content. It is primarily used to optimize content delivery rather than providing low-latency access to cloud-stored data for local applications. therefore.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：该服务是一种混合云存储服务，允许本地应用程序以低延迟访问存储在 AWS 云中的数据。它支持文件、卷和磁带网关模式，旨在与本地环境连接。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: This service is a hybrid cloud storage service that allows on-premises applications to access data stored in the AWS Cloud with low latency. It supports file, volume, and tape gateway modes and is designed to interface with local environments.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Backup 是一项集中式备份服务，用于管理和自动运行 AWS 服务的备份。它不提供低延迟访问，也不能被本地应用程序用来直接访问云数据。所以。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a centralized backup service that manages and automates the backup of AWS services. It does not provide low-latency access, nor can it be used by local applications to directly access cloud data. Therefore.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该服务是一种数据迁移服务，用于将数据快速转移到云或从云转移到本地端。它主要用于数据迁移而不是连续的低延迟访问。所以。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a data migration service for quickly transferring data to the cloud or from the cloud to local. It is primarily used for data migration rather than continuous low-latency access. Therefore.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：该服务是一种混合云存储服务，允许本地应用程序以低延迟访问存储在 AWS 云中的数据。它支持文件、卷和磁带网关模式，旨在与本地环境连接。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This service is a hybrid cloud storage service that allows on-premises applications to access data stored in the AWS Cloud with low latency. It supports file, volume, and tape gateway modes and is designed to interface with local environments.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: Amazon CloudFront 提供什么？
question_text.en: What does Amazon CloudFront provide?

A.zh: 自动扩展所有资源，以通过单一统一接口为应用程序提供支持
A.en: Automatic scaling for all resources to power an application from a single unified interface

B.zh: 以低延迟向全球用户安全发送数据、视频、应用程序和 API
B.en: Secure delivery of data, videos, applications, and APIs to users globally with low latency

C.zh: 能够通过各种路由类型直接管理全球流量，包括基于延迟的路由、地理 DNS、地理位置邻近度和加权循环
C.en: Ability to directly manage traffic globally through a variety of routing types, including latency-based routing, geo DNS, geoproximity, and weighted round robin

D.zh: 跨多个目标（例如 Amazon EC2 实例、容器、IP 地址和 AWS Lambda 函数）自动分配传入应用程序流量
D.en: Automatic distribution of incoming application traffic across multiple targets, such as Amazon EC2 instances, containers, IP addresses, and AWS Lambda functions

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：此选项描述的是 AWS Auto Scaling 的功能，而非 Amazon CloudFront。 CloudFront的主要功能是内容分发，而不是资源自动扩展。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option describes a feature of AWS Auto Scaling, not Amazon CloudFront. The main function of CloudFront is content distribution, not resource automatic expansion.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：此选项精确描述了 Amazon CloudFront 的核心功能。 CloudFront 通过其全球分布的边缘站点提供安全、低延迟的内容交付服务。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option accurately describes the core functionality of Amazon CloudFront. CloudFront provides secure, low-latency content delivery services through its globally distributed edge locations.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：此选项描述 Amazon Route 53 的功能，而非 Amazon CloudFront。 Route 53 是AWS的DNS服务，支持多种路由类型。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option describes the functionality of Amazon Route 53, not Amazon CloudFront. Route 53 is AWS's DNS service and supports multiple routing types.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：此选项描述 Elastic Load Balancing (ELB) 的功能，而非 Amazon CloudFront。 ELB用于分发应用程序流量，而CloudFront则用于内容分发。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option describes a feature of Elastic Load Balancing (ELB), not Amazon CloudFront. ELB is used to distribute application traffic, while CloudFront is used for content distribution.

answer_text.zh: B. 以低延迟向全球用户安全发送数据、视频、应用程序和 API
answer_text.en: B. Secure delivery of data, videos, applications, and APIs to users globally with low latency

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：此选项精确描述了 Amazon CloudFront 的核心功能。 CloudFront 通过其全球分布的边缘站点提供安全、低延迟的内容交付服务。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option accurately describes the core functionality of Amazon CloudFront. CloudFront provides secure, low-latency content delivery services through its globally distributed edge locations.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪种 AWS 服务支持在 AWS 云中部署和管理应用程序？
question_text.en: Which AWS service supports the deployment and management of applications in the AWS Cloud?

A.zh: Amazon CodeGuru
A.en: Amazon CodeGuru

B.zh: AWS Fargate
B.en: AWS Fargate

C.zh: AWS CodeCommit
C.en: AWS CodeCommit

D.zh: AWS Elastic Beanstalk
D.en: AWS Elastic Beanstalk

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该服务是一个代码分析工具，用于帮助开发人员识别代码中的问题并优化性能。它不支持应用程序部署和管理。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a code analysis tool used to help developers identify problems in their code and optimize performance. It does not support application deployment and management.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该服务是一个无服务器计算引擎，用于运行容器化应用程序，但它不直接负责应用程序部署和管理。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a serverless computing engine used to run containerized applications, but it is not directly responsible for application deployment and management.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS CodeCommit 是用于存储代码的托管源代码控制服务，但不支持应用程序部署和管理。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a managed source code control service for storing code, but it does not support application deployment and management.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Elastic Beanstalk 是一项完全托管的服务，支持应用程序部署和管理。它可以自动运行部署、容量调整、负载平衡和监控等任务。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: This service is a fully managed service that supports application deployment and management. It automates tasks such as deployment, capacity sizing, load balancing, and monitoring.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：D (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Elastic Beanstalk 是一项完全托管的服务，支持应用程序部署和管理。它可以自动运行部署、容量调整、负载平衡和监控等任务。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This service is a fully managed service that supports application deployment and management. It automates tasks such as deployment, capacity sizing, load balancing, and monitoring.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望将自然语言处理 (NLP) 集成到商业智能 (BI) 仪表板中。该公司希望提出问题并通过相关可视化获得答案。哪种 AWS 服务或工具可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to integrate natural language processing (NLP) into business intelligence (BI) dashboards. The company wants to ask questions and receive answers with relevant visualizations. Which AWS service or tool will meet these requirements?

A.zh: Amazon Macie
A.en: Amazon Macie

B.zh: Amazon Rekognition
B.en: Amazon Rekognition

C.zh: Amazon QuickSight Q
C.en: Amazon QuickSight Q

D.zh: Amazon Lex
D.en: Amazon Lex

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Macie 是一项数据安全服务，用于识别和保护敏感数据，例如个人识别信息 (PII)。它与自然语言处理 (NLP) 或商业智能 (BI) 仪表板无关。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a data security service that identifies and protects sensitive data, such as personally identifiable information (PII). It has nothing to do with natural language processing (NLP) or business intelligence (BI) dashboards.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该服务是一项图像和视频分析服务，用于识别物体、脸部、文本等。它不支持自然语言查询或产生数据可视化。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is an image and video analysis service for identifying objects, faces, text, and more. It does not support natural language queries or generate data visualizations.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：该服务是集成到 Amazon QuickSight 中的基于自然语言的查询功能。它允许用户通过自然语言提出问题，并产生自定义的可视化仪表板，完美满足问题的要求。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: This service is a natural language-based query capability integrated into Amazon QuickSight. It allows users to ask questions through natural language and generate a custom visual dashboard, which perfectly meets the requirements of the question.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该服务是创建支持语音和文本交互的对话界面（例如Gantianbot）的服务。虽然它涉及自然语言处理（NLP），但它并不直接支持商业智能仪表板或数据可视化。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a service for building conversational noodles (such as Gantianbot) that supports voice and text interaction. Although it involves natural language processing (NLP), it does not directly support business intelligence dashboards or data visualization.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：该服务是集成到 Amazon QuickSight 中的基于自然语言的查询功能。它允许用户通过自然语言提出问题，并产生自定义的可视化仪表板，完美满足问题的要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This service is a natural language-based query capability integrated into Amazon QuickSight. It allows users to ask questions through natural language and generate a custom visual dashboard, which perfectly meets the requirements of the question.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪一种 Amazon S3 功能或存储类别使用 AWS 主干网络和边缘位置来减少从最终用户到 Amazon S3 的延迟？
question_text.en: Which Amazon S3 feature or storage class uses the AWS backbone network and edge locations to reduce latencies from the end user to Amazon S3?

A.zh: S3 Cross-Region Replication
A.en: S3 Cross-Region Replication

B.zh: S3 Transfer Acceleration
B.en: S3 Transfer Acceleration

C.zh: S3 Event Notifications
C.en: S3 Event Notifications

D.zh: S3 Standard-Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA)
D.en: S3 Standard-Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA)

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该服务用于在不同区域之间复制对象以进行灾难恢复或数据分发，但它不会直接减少最终用户到 S3 的延迟。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is used to replicate objects between different regions for disaster recovery or data distribution, but it does not directly reduce latency from end users to S3.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：通过使用 AWS 的全球边缘站点和骨干网络加速数据传输，减少从最终用户到 S3 的延迟。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: reduces latency from the end user to S3 by using AWS's global edge locations and backbone network to accelerate data transfer.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该选项用于触发事件通知（例如对象创建或删除），与数据传输性能无关。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: These choices are used to trigger event notifications (such as object creation or deletion) and have nothing to do with data transmission performance.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：S3 Standard-IA 是一种存储类，主要用于数据存储，无需复杂的访问，优化存储成本，与减少延迟无关。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: S3 Standard-IA is a storage class mainly used for data storage without complicated access, optimizing storage costs and has nothing to do with reducing latency.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：通过使用 AWS 的全球边缘站点和骨干网络加速数据传输，减少从最终用户到 S3 的延迟。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: reduces latency from the end user to S3 by using AWS's global edge locations and backbone network to accelerate data transfer.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪一种 AWS 服务能够在 AWS 云中托管 NoSQL 数据库？
question_text.en: Which AWS service provides the ability to host a NoSQL database in the AWS Cloud?

A.zh: Amazon Aurora
A.en: Amazon Aurora

B.zh: Amazon DynamoDB
B.en: Amazon DynamoDB

C.zh: Amazon RDS
C.en: Amazon RDS

D.zh: Amazon Redshift
D.en: Amazon Redshift

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Aurora 是关系数据库服务，支持 MySQL 和 PostgreSQL 兼容数据库，而不是 NoSQL 数据库。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a relational database service that supports MySQL and PostgreSQL-compatible databases, not NoSQL databases.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon DynamoDB 是一项完全托管的 NoSQL 数据库服务，旨在实现高性能和可可扩展性。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: This service is a fully managed NoSQL database service designed for high performance and scalability.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon RDS 是关系数据库服务，支持多种数据库引擎（例如MySQL、PostgreSQL、SQL Server等），并非NoSQL数据库。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a relational database service that supports multiple database engines (such as MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, etc.) and is not a NoSQL database.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该服务是一个数据仓库服务，主要用于分析和处理结构化数据，而不是NoSQL数据库。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a data warehouse service mainly used for analyzing and processing structured data, not a NoSQL database.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon DynamoDB 是一项完全托管的 NoSQL 数据库服务，旨在实现高性能和可可扩展性。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This service is a fully managed NoSQL database service designed for high performance and scalability.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪一种 AWS 服务是与 MySQL 和 PostgreSQL 兼容的关系数据库？
question_text.en: Which AWS service is a relational database compatible with MySQL and PostgreSQL?

A.zh: Amazon Redshift
A.en: Amazon Redshift

B.zh: Amazon DynamoDB
B.en: Amazon DynamoDB

C.zh: Amazon Aurora
C.en: Amazon Aurora

D.zh: Amazon Neptune
D.en: Amazon Neptune

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Redshift 是数据仓库服务，主要用于分析和处理大规模数据集，而不是关系数据库服务。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a data warehouse service, mainly used for analyzing and processing large-scale data sets, rather than a relational database service.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon DynamoDB 是NoSQL数据库服务，适合键值和文件存储，不支持关系数据库的功能。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a NoSQL database service, suitable for key-value and document storage, and does not support the functions of relational databases.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon Aurora 是高性能关系数据库服务，完全兼容于MySQL和PostgreSQL。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: This service is a high-performance relational database service that is fully compatible with MySQL and PostgreSQL.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该服务是专门为处理图数据而设计的图数据库服务，而不是关系数据库。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a graph database service specifically designed to handle graph data, not a relational database.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon Aurora 是高性能关系数据库服务，完全兼容于MySQL和PostgreSQL。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This service is a high-performance relational database service that is fully compatible with MySQL and PostgreSQL.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪一种架构设计原则描述了隔离 AWS 云中依赖组件之间的故障的需要？
question_text.en: Which architecture design principle describes the need to isolate failures between dependent components in the AWS Cloud?

A.zh: 使用整体设计。
A.en: Use a monolithic design.

B.zh: 自动化设计。
B.en: Design for automation.

C.zh: 单点故障设计。
C.en: Design for single points of failure.

D.zh: 松散耦合的组件。
D.en: Loosely couple components.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：单体设计意味着所有组件紧密耦合在一起，任何一个组件的故障都可能导致整个系统崩溃。这违背了故障隔离的原则。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Monolithic design means that all components are tightly coupled together, and the failure of any one component may lead to the collapse of the entire system. This goes against the principle of fault isolation.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：自动化旨在简化操作并提高效率，但与隔离故障没有直接关系。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Automation is designed to simplify operations and increase efficiency, but is not directly related to isolating faults.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：单点故障是架构设计中要避免的情况，而不是设计原则。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Single points of failure are situations to be avoided in architectural design, not a design principle.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：松散耦合的组件是AWS架构设计的核心原则之一，旨在确保系统的各个部分能够独立运行，从而隔离故障，提高系统可靠性。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: Loosely coupled components are one of the core principles of AWS architecture design, aiming to ensure that various parts of the system can operate independently, thereby isolating faults and improving system reliability.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：D (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：松散耦合的组件是AWS架构设计的核心原则之一，旨在确保系统的各个部分能够独立运行，从而隔离故障，提高系统可靠性。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Loosely coupled components are one of the core principles of AWS architecture design, aiming to ensure that various parts of the system can operate independently, thereby isolating faults and improving system reliability.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 云计算的哪些优势使公司能够通过 AWS 区域、可用区和边缘站点网络向世界各地的用户部署应用程序？
question_text.en: Which benefit of cloud computing gives a company the ability to deploy applications to users all over the world through a network of AWS Regions, Availability Zones, and edge locations?

A.zh: 规模经济
A.en: Economy of scale

B.zh: 全球影响力
B.en: Global reach

C.zh: 敏捷
C.en: Agility

D.zh: 高可用性
D.en: High availability

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：规模经济）：规模经济是指通过云计算共享资源来降低成本，但与全球覆盖范围没有直接关系。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: economies of scale): Economies of scale refer to cost reductions through shared resources in cloud computing, but are not directly related to global coverage.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：全球覆盖）：通过其全球区域、可用区和边缘站点，AWS 使用户能够将应用程序部署到世界各地，以满足全球覆盖需求。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Global coverage): Through its global Regions, Availability Zones and Edge Locations, AWS enables users to deploy applications to all parts of the world to meet global coverage needs.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：敏捷性是指快速反应变化的能力，与全球覆盖范围没有直接关系。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Agility refers to the ability to respond quickly to change and is not directly related to global coverage.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：高可用性是指系统在故障的情况下仍能正常运行的能力，与全球覆盖范围没有直接关系。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: High availability refers to the ability of a system to operate normally despite failures and is not directly related to global coverage.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：全球覆盖）：通过其全球区域、可用区和边缘站点，AWS 使用户能够将应用程序部署到世界各地，以满足全球覆盖需求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Global coverage): Through its global Regions, Availability Zones and Edge Locations, AWS enables users to deploy applications to all parts of the world to meet global coverage needs.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪种 AWS 服务可以更轻松地监控应用程序日志和云资源并对其进行故障排除？
question_text.en: Which AWS service makes it easier to monitor and troubleshoot application logs and cloud resources?

A.zh: Amazon EC2
A.en: Amazon EC2

B.zh: AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM)
B.en: AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM)

C.zh: Amazon CloudWatch
C.en: Amazon CloudWatch

D.zh: AWS CloudTrail
D.en: AWS CloudTrail

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon EC2 是用于运行虚拟服务器实例的计算服务。它不直接提供监控和日志管理功能。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a computing service used to run virtual server instances. It does not directly provide monitoring and log management functions.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：IAM 是一种身份识别和访问管理服务，用于控制对 AWS 资源的访问。它与监控和日志管理没有直接关系。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: IAM is an identity and access management service used to control access to AWS resources. It is not directly related to monitoring and log management.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：该服务是一项监控和管理服务，用于收集和分析日志数据并监控 AWS 资源和应用程序的性能。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: This service is a monitoring and management service that collects and analyzes log data and monitors the performance of AWS resources and applications.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS CloudTrail主要用于记录用户和服务的API调用历史记录，以协助审计和合规性检查。虽然它涉及日志记录，但其主要用途不是实时监控和故障排除。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is mainly used to record the API call history of users and services to help with auditing and compliance checks. While it involves logging, its primary use is not real-time monitoring and troubleshooting.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：该服务是一项监控和管理服务，用于收集和分析日志数据并监控 AWS 资源和应用程序的性能。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This service is a monitoring and management service that collects and analyzes log data and monitors the performance of AWS resources and applications.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪一种 AWS 服务使用 AWS Compute Optimizer 根据工作负载指标提供规模调整建议？
question_text.en: Which AWS service uses AWS Compute Optimizer to provide sizing recommendations based on workload metrics?

A.zh: Amazon EC2
A.en: Amazon EC2

B.zh: Amazon RDS
B.en: Amazon RDS

C.zh: Amazon Lightsail
C.en: Amazon Lightsail

D.zh: AWS Step Functions
D.en: AWS Step Functions

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Compute Optimizer 主要用于分析 Amazon EC2 实例的使用情况，并根据工作负载提供优化建议，例如调整实例类型或大小。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS Compute Optimizer is mainly used to analyze the usage of Amazon EC2 instances and provide optimization recommendations based on workload, such as adjusting instance type or size.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然 Amazon RDS 也可以运行性能优化，但它并不会直接使用 AWS Compute Optimizer 来提供优化建议。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although Amazon RDS can also perform performance optimization, it does not directly use AWS Compute Optimizer to provide optimization recommendations.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该服务是一个简化的云服务，主要针对小型应用程序和开发人员。它不与 AWS Compute Optimizer 集成。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a simplified cloud service mainly aimed at small applications and developers. It does not integrate with AWS Compute Optimizer.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该服务是一项编排服务，用于为分布式应用程序创建工作流程，与 AWS Compute Optimizer无关。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is an orchestration service for building workflows for distributed applications, independent of AWS Compute Optimizer.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Compute Optimizer 主要用于分析 Amazon EC2 实例的使用情况，并根据工作负载提供优化建议，例如调整实例类型或大小。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS Compute Optimizer is mainly used to analyze the usage of Amazon EC2 instances and provide optimization recommendations based on workload, such as adjusting instance type or size.

question_text.zh: 哪一种 AWS 服务可以通过收集本地数据中心的配置、使用情况和行为数据来帮助公司规划向 AWS 的迁移？

A.en: AWS Resource Groups

B.en: AWS Application Discovery Service

C.en: AWS Service Catalog

D.en: AWS Systems Manager

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该选项用于组织和管理 AWS 资源分组，与迁移或收集本地数据中心信息无关。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: These choices are used to organize and manage groupings of AWS resources and have nothing to do with migrating or collecting local data center information.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：该服务旨在协助企业收集本地数据中心的配置、使用情况和行为数据，以便在迁移到 AWS 之前进行迁移规划。

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：该服务旨在协助企业收集本地数据中心的配置、使用情况和行为数据，以便在迁移到 AWS 之前进行迁移规划。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This service is designed to help enterprises collect configuration, usage, and behavioral data on on-premises data centers for migration planning before migrating to AWS.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪一种 AWS 服务使用发布者和订阅者的组合？
question_text.en: Which AWS service uses a combination of publishers and subscribers?

A.zh: AWS Lambda
A.en: AWS Lambda

B.zh: Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS)
B.en: Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS)

C.zh: Amazon CloudWatch
C.en: Amazon CloudWatch

D.zh: AWS CloudFormation
D.en: AWS CloudFormation

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Lambda 是一种无服务器计算服务，用于运行代码以响应事件。它不会直接使用发布者和订阅者模式。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a serverless computing service used to run code in response to events. It does not use the publisher and subscriber pattern directly.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon SNS 是一种支持发布者和订阅者模型的消息服务。发布者向主题发送消息，订阅者接收消息。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon SNS is a messaging service that supports publisher and subscriber models. Publishers send messages to topics and subscribers receive messages.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon CloudWatch 是一项收集和追踪指标数据的监控和管理服务。它不涉及发布者和订阅者模式。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a monitoring and management service that collects and tracks metric data. It does not involve publisher and subscriber patterns.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS CloudFormation 是一项基础设施即代码服务，用于定义和管理 AWS 资源。它不使用发布者和订阅者模式。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is an infrastructure-as-code service for defining and managing AWS resources. It does not use publisher and subscriber pattern.

answer_text.zh: B. Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS)
answer_text.en: B. Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS)

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon SNS 是一种支持发布者和订阅者模型的消息服务。发布者向主题发送消息，订阅者接收消息。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon SNS is a messaging service that supports publisher and subscriber models. Publishers send messages to topics and subscribers receive messages.

question_text.zh: 一家公司正处于计划迁移到 AWS 的早期阶段。该公司希望获得未来 Amazon EC2 实例和相关存储的每月预测 AWS 总拥有成本。公司应该使用哪种 AWS 服务或工具来满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company is in the early stages of planning a migration to AWS. The company wants to obtain the monthly predicted total AWS cost of ownership for future Amazon EC2 instances and associated storage. Which AWS service or tool should the company use to meet these requirements?

A.zh: AWS Pricing Calculator
A.en: AWS Pricing Calculator

B.zh: AWS Compute Optimizer
B.en: AWS Compute Optimizer

C.zh: AWS Trusted Advisor
C.en: AWS Trusted Advisor

D.zh: AWS Application Migration Service
D.en: AWS Application Migration Service

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Pricing Calculator 是一种用于估算 AWS 服务（包括 Amazon EC2 实例和存储）未来成本的工具。它允许用户输入配置参数并生成详细的成本估算。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: The AWS Pricing Calculator is a tool for estimating future costs of AWS services, including Amazon EC2 instances and storage. It allows users to enter configuration parameters and generate detailed cost estimates.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Compute Optimizer 的主要功能是提供优化建议以提高资源效率并降低成本，但它不用于预测未来成本。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The primary function of AWS Compute Optimizer is to provide optimization recommendations to improve resource efficiency and reduce costs, but it is not used to predict future costs.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该服务是一个检查工具，可以帮助用户优化其AWS环境的安全性、性能和成本，但不提供详细的成本测试功能。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a checking tool that helps users optimize the security, performance, and cost of their AWS environment, but it does not provide detailed cost testing capabilities.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该服务是一个用于迁移应用程序的工具，与成本测试无关。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a tool for migrating applications that has nothing to do with cost testing.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Pricing Calculator 是一种用于估算 AWS 服务（包括 Amazon EC2 实例和存储）未来成本的工具。它允许用户输入配置参数并生成详细的成本估算。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The AWS Pricing Calculator is a tool for estimating future costs of AWS services, including Amazon EC2 instances and storage. It allows users to enter configuration parameters and generate detailed cost estimates.

D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is used to analyze and optimize costs, helping users view and predict expenses, but does not involve real-time monitoring of resources and applications.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: 哪些 AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF) 功能属于业务角度？
question_text.en: Which AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF) capability belongs to the business perspective?

A.zh: 计划与项目管理
A.en: Program and project management

B.zh: 数据科学
B.en: Data science

C.zh: 可观察性
C.en: Observability

D.zh: 变更与发布管理
D.en: Change and release management

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：项目和项目集管理错误。项目和项目集管理属于AWS CAF的组织观点（Organizational Perspective），而非业务观点。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Project and program management errors. Project and program management belong to the organizational perspective (Organizational Perspective) of AWS CAF, not the business perspective.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：这项服务是数据科学，属于 AWS CAF 的商业视角，因为它与商业决策和价值创造直接相关。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: This service is Data science falls under the Business Perspective of AWS CAF because it is directly related to business decisions and value creation.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：可观测性属于技术角度，与系统监控和性能优化相关。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Observability belongs to the technical perspective and is related to system monitoring and performance optimization.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：秒。变更和发布管理属于AWS CAF的操作视角，与系统维护和更新相关。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: s. Change and release management belongs to the Operations Perspective of AWS CAF and is related to system maintenance and updates.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (91%) 9%。热门讨论与考点摘要：这项服务是数据科学，属于 AWS CAF 的商业视角，因为它与商业决策和价值创造直接相关。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (91%) 9%. Popular discussion and key point summary: This service is Data science falls under the Business Perspective of AWS CAF because it is directly related to business decisions and value creation.

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

question_text.zh: 在使用 Amazon EC2 实例时，哪些 AWS 资源可以帮助公司降低成本以换取使用承诺？
question_text.en: Which AWS resource can help a company reduce its costs in exchange for a usage commitment when using Amazon EC2 instances?

A.zh: 计算节省计划
A.en: Compute Savings Plans

B.zh: Auto Scaling 组
B.en: Auto Scaling group

C.zh: 按需型实例
C.en: On-Demand Instance

D.zh: EC2 实例存储
D.en: EC2 instance store

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：计算节省计划是一种定价模型，允许用户通过承诺一定的使用量来实现显著的成本节省。它适用于 Amazon EC2 实例，并提供在不同实例类型、操作系统和区域之间切换的灵活性。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Compute Savings Plans are a pricing model that allows users to achieve significant cost savings by committing to a certain amount of usage. It works on Amazon EC2 instances and provides the flexibility to switch between different instance types, operating systems, and regions.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该选项 用于动态调整 EC2 实例的数量以满足需求，但它们本身并不会直接提供节省成本的承诺机制。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: s are used to dynamically adjust the number of EC2 instances to meet demand, but they do not themselves directly provide a commitment mechanism for cost savings.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：按需型实例 是最灵活的定价选项，但它们通常成本更高，因为没有使用承诺或折扣。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: s are the most flexible pricing option, but they generally cost more because there are no usage commitments or discounts.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：EC2 实例存储是一种临时选项，与成本优化无关。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: EC2 instance storage is a temporary storage option and has nothing to do with cost optimization.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：计算节省计划是一种定价模型，允许用户通过承诺一定的使用量来实现显著的成本节省。它适用于 Amazon EC2 实例，并提供在不同实例类型、操作系统和区域之间切换的灵活性。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Compute Savings Plans are a pricing model that allows users to achieve significant cost savings by committing to a certain amount of usage. It works on Amazon EC2 instances and provides the flexibility to switch between different instance types, operating systems, and regions.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF) 中的哪个视角包含精心设计的数据和分析架构的功能？
question_text.en: Which perspective in the AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF) includes a capability for well-designed data and analytics architecture?

A.zh: 安全
A.en: Security

B.zh: 治理
B.en: Governance

C.zh: 操作
C.en: Operations

D.zh: 平台
D.en: Platform

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：安全观点主要关注安全、合规和风险管理，与数据和分析架构的设计没有直接关系。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The Security perspective mainly focuses on security, compliance and risk management, and is not directly related to the design of data and analysis architecture.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：治理观点主要关注IT治理、预算管理和项目管理，与数据和分析架构的设计没有直接关系。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The Governance perspective mainly focuses on IT governance, budget management and project management, and is not directly related to the design of data and analysis architecture.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：运维观点主要关注运维流程、事件管理和持续改进，与数据和分析架构的设计没有直接关系。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The Operations perspective mainly focuses on operational processes, event management and continuous improvement, and is not directly related to the design of data and analysis architecture.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：平台视角着重于技术架构，包括数据和分析架构的设计，因此是正确的答案。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: The Platform perspective focuses on technical architecture, including the design of data and analytics architecture, and is therefore the correct answer.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：D (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：平台视角着重于技术架构，包括数据和分析架构的设计，因此是正确的答案。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The Platform perspective focuses on technical architecture, including the design of data and analytics architecture, and is therefore the correct answer.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF) 人们视角的功能有哪些选项？ （选两个。）
question_text.en: Which options are AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF) people perspective capabilities? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 组织调整
A.en: Organizational alignment

B.zh: 投资组合管理
B.en: Portfolio management

C.zh: 组织设计
C.en: Organization design

D.zh: 风险管理
D.en: Risk management

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：组织一致性）：组织一致性是 AWS CAF People Perspective 的核心功能之一，旨在确保组织的目标、角色和职责与云采用策略保持一致。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Organizational Consistency): Organizational Alignment is one of the core capabilities of AWS CAF People Perspective, which is designed to ensure that the organization's goals, roles, and responsibilities are aligned with the cloud adoption strategy.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：产品组合管理是 AWS CAF 业务视角的功能，与人员视角无关。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Portfolio management is a capability of AWS CAF Business Perspective and has nothing to do with People Perspective.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：组织设计）：组织设计是 AWS CAF People Perspective 的功能之一，涉及如何设计组织结构以支持云采用。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Organizational Design): Organizational design is one of the capabilities of AWS CAF People Perspective and involves how to design the organizational structure to support cloud adoption.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：风险管理是 AWS CAF 治理观点的功能，与人员视角无关。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Risk management is a capability of AWS CAF Governance Perspective and has nothing to do with People Perspective.

E.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：现代应用程序开发是 AWS CAF 技术视角的能力，与人员视角无关。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Modern application development is a capability of the AWS CAF Technology Perspective and has nothing to do with the People Perspective.

answer_text.zh: A. 组织调整；C. 组织设计
answer_text.en: A. Organizational alignment; C. Organization design

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：AC (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：组织一致性）：组织一致性是 AWS CAF People Perspective 的核心功能之一，旨在确保组织的目标、角色和职责与云采用策略保持一致。；组织设计）：组织设计是 AWS CAF People Perspective 的功能之一，涉及如何设计组织结构以支持云采用。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: AC (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Organizational Consistency): Organizational Alignment is one of the core capabilities of AWS CAF People Perspective, which is designed to ensure that the organization's goals, roles, and responsibilities are aligned with the cloud adoption strategy.; Organizational Design): Organizational design is one of the capabilities of AWS CAF People Perspective and involves how to design the organizational structure to support cloud adoption.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: 公司需要在技术和业务之间架起一座桥梁，以帮助形成持续成长和学习的文化。 AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF) 中的哪个视角扮演了这座桥梁？
question_text.en: A company needs a bridge between technology and business to help evolve to a culture of continuous growth and learning. Which perspective in the AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF) serves as this bridge?

A.zh: 人
A.en: People

B.zh: 治理
B.en: Governance

C.zh: 操作
C.en: Operations

D.zh: 安全
D.en: Security

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：人的视角关注人和组织文化的变革，帮助企业创建技术和业务之间的桥梁，促进持续学习和成长。这正是题目中所描述的要求。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: The People perspective focuses on the transformation of people and organizational culture, helping companies build bridges between technology and business and promote continuous learning and growth. This is exactly the requirement described in the title.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：治理观点着重于如何管理云环境中的风险、合规性和策略，与问题中所述的文化转型和学习桥梁无关。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The Governance perspective focuses on how to manage risks, compliance and policies in the cloud environment, and has nothing to do with the cultural transformation and learning bridge stated in the question.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：运维观点着重于云环境的运维效率和流程优化，与问题中所述的文化转型和学习桥梁没有直接关系。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The Operations perspective focuses on the operational efficiency and process optimization of the cloud environment, and is not directly related to the cultural transformation and learning bridge stated in the question.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：安全视角着重于云环境的安全和数据保护，与问题中所述的文化转型和学习桥梁没有直接关系。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The Security perspective focuses on the security and data protection of cloud environments and is not directly related to the cultural transformation and learning bridge stated in the question.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：人的视角关注人和组织文化的变革，帮助企业创建技术和业务之间的桥梁，促进持续学习和成长。这正是题目中所描述的要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The People perspective focuses on the transformation of people and organizational culture, helping companies build bridges between technology and business and promote continuous learning and growth. This is exactly the requirement described in the title.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: 在 AWS 责任共担模式下，哪一个选项是 AWS 的责任？
question_text.en: Which option is a responsibility of AWS under the AWS shared responsibility model?

A.zh: 应用程序数据安全
A.en: Application data security

B.zh: 在 Amazon EC2 实例上运行的应用程序的修补程序管理
B.en: Patch management for applications that run on Amazon EC2 instances

C.zh: 托管服务底层基础设施的修补程序管理
C.en: Patch management of the underlying infrastructure for managed services

D.zh: 应用程序身份与访问管理
D.en: Application identity and access management

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：应用程序数据安全是客户的责任，因为客户有责任管理和保护其存储在 AWS 上的数据，包括加密、访问控制等。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Application data security is the customer's responsibility, as customers are responsible for managing and protecting their data stored on AWS, including encryption, access control, etc.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：在 Amazon EC2 实例上运行的应用程序的修补程序管理错误。 EC2 实例上运行的应用程序的修补程序管理由客户负责，因为客户可以完全控制 EC2 实例及其上运行的应用程序。分发。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Patch management error for applications running on Amazon EC2 instances. Patch management of applications running on EC2 instances is the responsibility of the customer, as the customer has full control over the EC2 instance and the applications running on it. Distribute.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：托管服务底层基础设施的修补程序管理是AWS 负责管理托管服务的底层基础设施（如Amazon RDS、Amazon S3等），包括操作系统和底层硬件的修补程序管理。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Patch management of the hosting service's underlying infrastructure is AWS is responsible for managing the underlying infrastructure of hosted services (such as Amazon RDS, Amazon S3, etc.), including patch management of the operating system and underlying hardware.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：应用程序身份和访问管理是客户的责任，因为客户需要设置 IAM 策略和权限来保护其应用程序。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Application identity and access management is the customer's responsibility, as customers need to configure IAM policies and permissions to protect their applications.

answer_text.zh: C. 托管服务底层基础设施的修补程序管理
answer_text.en: C. Patch management of the underlying infrastructure for managed services

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：托管服务底层基础设施的修补程序管理是AWS 负责管理托管服务的底层基础设施（如Amazon RDS、Amazon S3等），包括操作系统和底层硬件的修补程序管理。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Patch management of the hosting service's underlying infrastructure is AWS is responsible for managing the underlying infrastructure of hosted services (such as Amazon RDS, Amazon S3, etc.), including patch management of the operating system and underlying hardware.

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

question_text.zh: 哪一种 AWS 服务或资源可以识别与另一个 AWS 账户共用的一个 AWS 账户中的 IAM 资源并提供报告？
question_text.en: Which AWS service or resource can identify and provide reports on IAM resources in one AWS account that is shared with another AWS account?

A.zh: IAM credential report
A.en: IAM credential report

B.zh: AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On)
B.en: AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On)

C.zh: IAM Access Analyzer
C.en: AWS Identity and Access Management Access Analyzer

D.zh: Amazon Cognito user pool
D.en: Amazon Cognito user pool

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：IAM凭证报告主要用于为账户内的IAM用户产生凭证状态报告（如密码是否过期、访问密钥是否启用等），但不涉及跨账户资源共享的分析。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The IAM Credential Report is mainly used to generate credential status reports for IAM users in the account (such as whether the password has expired, whether the access key is enabled, etc.), but it does not involve the analysis of cross-account resource sharing.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：此选项不符合问题所需的 AWS 功能或责任范围。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option does not meet the AWS capabilities or scope of responsibility required by the question.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：访问分析器可以协助识别和分析IAM资源（如玄府）是否允许跨账户访问并产生边界报告。这正是问题所要求的功能。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Access Analyzer can help identify and analyze whether IAM resources (such as Xuanfu) allow cross-account access and generate boundary reports. This is exactly the function required by the question.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Cognito 主要用于管理应用程序的用户验证和授权，与跨账户资源共享分析无关。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon Cognito is primarily used to manage user authentication and authorization for applications and has nothing to do with cross-account resource sharing analysis.

answer_text.en: C. AWS Identity and Access Management Access Analyzer

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：访问分析器可以协助识别和分析IAM资源（如玄府）是否允许跨账户访问并产生边界报告。这正是问题所要求的功能。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Access Analyzer can help identify and analyze whether IAM resources (such as Xuanfu) allow cross-account access and generate boundary reports. This is exactly the function required by the question.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: AWS Well-Architected Framework的哪个支柱着重于计算资源的结构化和简化分配？
question_text.en: Which AWS Well-Architected Framework pillar focuses on structured and streamlined allocation of computing resources?

A.zh: 可靠性
A.en: Reliability

B.zh: 卓越运营
B.en: Operational excellence

C.zh: 性能效率
C.en: Performance efficiency

D.zh: 可持续性
D.en: Sustainability

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：可靠性支柱着重于系统面对故障时的弹性和稳定性，与资源配置的优化没有直接关系。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The reliability pillar focuses on the system's resilience and stability in the face of failures and is not directly related to the optimization of resource allocation.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：卓越运营支柱着重于运营和管理系统的最佳实践，与资源分配的优化没有直接关系。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The operational excellence pillar focuses on best practices for operating and managing systems and is not directly related to the optimization of resource allocation.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：性能效率支柱着重于优化资源分配，以确保工作负载能高效地运行。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: The performance efficiency pillar focuses on optimizing resource allocation to ensure workloads run efficiently.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：可持续性支柱的重点是减少环境影响，与资源配置的优化没有直接关系。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The sustainability pillar focuses on reducing environmental impact and is not directly related to the optimization of resource allocation.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：性能效率支柱着重于优化资源分配，以确保工作负载能高效地运行。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The performance efficiency pillar focuses on optimizing resource allocation to ensure workloads run efficiently.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: 哪些 AWS 云采用架构 (AWS CAF) 功能属于治理观点？ （选两个。）
question_text.en: Which AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF) capabilities belong to the governance perspective? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 计划与项目管理
A.en: Program and project management

B.zh: 产品管理
B.en: Product management

C.zh: 投资组合管理
C.en: Portfolio management

D.zh: 风险管理
D.en: Risk management

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：项目和计划管理是治理观点的重要组成部分，确保云迁移的规划和运行符合组织的目标。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Project and program management is an important part of the governance perspective, ensuring that cloud migration is planned and executed in line with the organization's goals.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：属于业务视角（Business Perspective），与治理视角无关。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: belongs to the business perspective (Business Perspective) and has nothing to do with the governance perspective.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：往往属于商业视角或财务视角，与治理视角的关注重点不一致。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: often falls within the business perspective or the financial perspective, which is inconsistent with the focus of the governance perspective.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：风险管理是治理观点的核心能力之一，用于识别和降低云迁移过程中的风险。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: This service is one of the core capabilities of the governance perspective and is used to identify and mitigate risks during cloud migration.

E.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：事件管理通常与运维观点相关，而不是与治理观点相关。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Incident management is often associated with the Operations Perspective rather than the Governance Perspective.

answer_text.zh: A. 计划与项目管理；D. 风险管理
answer_text.en: A. Program and project management; D. Risk management

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：AD (75%) CD (25%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：项目和计划管理是治理观点的重要组成部分，确保云迁移的规划和运行符合组织的目标。；风险管理是治理观点的核心能力之一，用于识别和降低云迁移过程中的风险。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: AD (75%) CD (25%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Project and program management is an important part of the governance perspective, ensuring that cloud migration is planned and executed in line with the organization's goals.; This service is one of the core capabilities of the governance perspective and is used to identify and mitigate risks during cloud migration.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望使用 AWS Managed Services (AMS) 提供运维支持，并希望了解 AMS 的范围。哪些 AMS 功能可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to use AWS Managed Services (AMS) for operational support and wants to understand the scope of AMS. Which AMS feature will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 登陆区与网络管理
A.en: Landing zone and network management

B.zh: 客户应用程序开发
B.en: Customer application development

C.zh: DevSecOps 管道配置
C.en: DevSecOps pipeline configuration

D.zh: 应用日志监控
D.en: Application log monitoring

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：AMS 的核心功能之一是协助客户设置和管理 Landing Zone（安全且合规的 AWS 环境）和网络管理。这是AMS的主要服务范围，符合问题的要求。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: One of the core functions of AMS is to help customers set up and manage Landing Zone (a secure and compliant AWS environment) and network management. This is the main service scope of AMS and meets the requirements of the question.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AMS 不负责客户端应用程序的开发，这是客户端或其他开发团队的责任。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AMS is not responsible for the development of client applications, which is the responsibility of the client or other development team.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AMS 不直接负责 DevSecOps 管道的配置，这通常由客户的开发团队或其他 AWS 服务（例如 CodePipeline）完成。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AMS is not directly responsible for the configuration of DevSecOps pipelines, which is typically done by the customer's development team or other AWS services such as CodePipeline.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然AMS提供监控服务，但其主要重点是基础设施层级的监控，而不是应用程序日志监控。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although AMS provides monitoring services, its main focus is on infrastructure-level monitoring rather than focusing on application log monitoring.

answer_text.zh: A. 登陆区与网络管理
answer_text.en: A. Landing zone and network management

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (71%) D (29%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AMS 的核心功能之一是协助客户设置和管理 Landing Zone（安全且合规的 AWS 环境）和网络管理。这是AMS的主要服务范围，符合问题的要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (71%) D (29%). Popular discussion and key point summary: One of the core functions of AMS is to help customers set up and manage Landing Zone (a secure and compliant AWS environment) and network management. This is the main service scope of AMS and meets the requirements of the question.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望将其本地 NoSQL 工作负载迁移到 Amazon DynamoDB。哪种 AWS 服务可以满足此要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to migrate its on-premises NoSQL workload to Amazon DynamoDB. Which AWS service will meet this requirement?

A.zh: AWS Migration Hub
A.en: AWS Migration Hub

B.zh: AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS)
B.en: AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS)

C.zh: 迁移评估器
C.en: Migration Evaluator

D.zh: AWS Application Migration Service
D.en: AWS Application Migration Service

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该服务是用于追踪和管理迁移项目进度的集中工具，但它本身并不会运行迁移任务。因此，该选项不符合题目要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a centralized tool for tracking and managing the progress of migration projects, but it does not perform migration tasks itself. Therefore, this option is wrong.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS DMS 专门用于迁移数据库，包括关系数据库和 NoSQL 数据库（例如 DynamoDB）。支持将数据从本地数据库迁移到AWS上的数据库服务。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS DMS is specifically used to migrate databases, including relational databases and NoSQL databases (such as DynamoDB). It supports migrating data from local databases to database services on AWS.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：迁移评估器用于评估迁移成本并提供迁移建议，但不运行实际的迁移任务。因此，该选项不符合题目要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is used to evaluate migration costs and provide migration recommendations, but it does not perform actual migration tasks. Therefore, this option is wrong.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Application Migration Service用于迁移整个应用程序和服务器，而不是专门用于数据库迁移。因此，该选项不符合题目要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is used to migrate entire applications and servers, not specifically database migrations. Therefore, this option is wrong.

answer_text.zh: B. AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS)
answer_text.en: B. AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS)

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS DMS 专门用于迁移数据库，包括关系数据库和 NoSQL 数据库（例如 DynamoDB）。支持将数据从本地数据库迁移到AWS上的数据库服务。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS DMS is specifically used to migrate databases, including relational databases and NoSQL databases (such as DynamoDB). It supports migrating data from local databases to database services on AWS.

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在寻找正确的 Amazon EC2 实例类型和大小以满足其性能和容量要求。该公司希望找到尽可能最低的成本。哪个选项准确地描述了公司的行为？
question_text.en: A company is in the process of finding correct Amazon EC2 instance types and sizes to meet its performance and capacity requirements. The company wants to find the lowest possible cost. Which option accurately characterizes the company's actions?

A.zh: 自动缩放
A.en: Auto Scaling

B.zh: 存储分层
B.en: Storage tiering

C.zh: 调整规模
C.en: Rightsizing

D.zh: 实例调度
D.en: Instance scheduling

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：自动缩放主要用于根据负载动态调整实例数量以满足需求，但不直接涉及选择正确的实例类型和大小。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is mainly used to dynamically adjust the number of instances based on load to meet demand, but it does not directly involve selecting the correct instance type and size.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该服务是一项关于存储优化的技术，与EC2实例的选择无关。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a technology about storage optimization and has nothing to do with the choice of EC2 instances.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：调整规模 是指分析和调整实例类型和大小以满足性能需求，同时优化成本。这正是题目中所描述的公司的行为。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: refers to analyzing and adjusting instance types and sizes to meet performance needs while optimizing costs. This is exactly the behavior of the company described in the title.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：实例调度 是指依照计划启动或停止实例以节省成本，但不涉及选择正确的实例类型和大小。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: refers to starting or stopping instances according to schedule to save costs, but it does not involve selecting the correct instance type and size.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：调整规模 是指分析和调整实例类型和大小以满足性能需求，同时优化成本。这正是题目中所描述的公司的行为。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: refers to analyzing and adjusting instance types and sizes to meet performance needs while optimizing costs. This is exactly the behavior of the company described in the title.
